// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable

namespace TestNs
{
    partial class MyControl<T>
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Defines the <see cref="Item"/> property.
        /// </summary>
        public static readonly global::Avalonia.StyledProperty<T?> ItemProperty =
            global::Avalonia.AvaloniaProperty.Register<global::TestNs.MyControl<T>, T?>(nameof(Item));

        public partial T? Item
        {
            get => GetValue(ItemProperty);
            set => SetValue(ItemProperty, value);
        }
    }
}
